defect: missing surge protection on field side
prompt: Assess how far along the work is, the percent complete, any defects, and the remaining work.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Loop checks & wiring, part of the Instrumentation & Controls scope. The observed field condition is: missing surge protection on field side. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: loop drawings, ISA 5.1. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: Progress assessment: Loop checks & wiring (production floor)
